creator: seetru@bellsouth.net
text:
when trying to right click to make a new folder or directory using konqueror in kde2.1.1 there is an error message that emptydir does not exist

Fix: 

in xterm run this command:

mkdir /usr/local/share/templates/.source/emptydir

thats all thank you
How-To-Repeat: right click with mouse in any directory using konqueror and select make new folder
